@everyone

Last Chance to Mint CORE Episode 1 Collectible Covers!

We're down to the last 5 hours of being able to mint both the Star Atlas and Magic Eden collectible covers for CORE Episode 1.

Only these covers can find the Key of Iris!

Learn more: https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel

 | Star Atlas Cover: https://play.staratlas.com/market/4Rrcj4MArUcMtHPp6amTy3SUXbCGYG3n8sf8KgMKjRnr
